query:
SELECT wc.remoteJid as wc_jid, ca.remoteJid as ca_jid, wc.assignedUserId, wc.status as wc_status, ca.status as ca_status
FROM wa_conversations wc 
JOIN conversation_assignments ca ON ca.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND ca.tenantId = wc.tenantId
WHERE wc.remoteJid != ca.remoteJid AND wc.assignedUserId IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 10;
